case_title: MACKENZIE ALEXANDER VS MCKECHNIE MICHAEL et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,338.00 FILED BY MACKENZIE ALEXANDER AS TO DEFENDANT MCKECHNIE MICHAEL RUSHING RAYMOND ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-23-1995 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MACKENZIE ALEXANDER IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MCKECHNIE MICHAEL RUSHING RAYMOND STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
